dashboard.title: Tableau de bord
dashboard.description: Shell du tableau de bord utilisateur compatible revue editoriale.
dashboard.readOnlyBody: Les widgets du tableau de bord restent volontairement limites jusqu'a l'activation des soumissions utilisateur.
dashboard.loginRequiredBody: Sign in first to load your dashboard session and observation cards.
dashboard.preferenceBody: Preferred UI language saved to your profile.
dashboard.followBody: Quick snapshot of follow system availability and your current follows.
dashboard.followDisabledNote: Follow system is currently disabled in community settings.
dashboard.notificationsBody: Current in-site/email notification preferences for your account.
dashboard.savedListsBody: Personal list coverage across saved places and posts.
dashboard.savedListsRemoveFailed: Could not update saved item state.
dashboard.commentsBody: Quick status from your latest comments.
dashboard.creatorBody: Public mini-site link, draft queue, and submit status for your UGC posts.
dashboard.creatorNoProfile: No creator profile found yet. Open account settings to create one.
dashboard.moderationQueueBody: Editor/admin roles can approve, reject, or mark spam directly from dashboard.
dashboard.moderationHistoryBody: Latest approved/rejected/spam actions with reviewer and timestamp.
dashboard.reportInboxBody: Community report signals from post/comment/photo/profile targets.
dashboard.accountRequestsBody: Deactivate/delete requests that require moderation approval.
dashboard.moderationNotesRequired: Moderation note is required for this action.
dashboard.localeBody: Locale progress is visible for editorial permissions.
dashboard.quickBody: Open account settings or continue product workflows.
dashboard.accessBody: Role-driven capability map for dashboard visibility. Backend permissions remain authoritative.
dashboard.roleGovernanceBody: Role mapping for owner/admin/editor/member and where permissions are managed.
dashboard.roleGovernanceOwnerScope: Full stack governance and production operations.
dashboard.roleGovernanceOwnerPolicy: Can assign/revoke admin and editor responsibilities.
dashboard.roleGovernanceAdminScope: Operational admin controls and moderation oversight.
dashboard.roleGovernanceAdminPolicy: Can manage editors and moderation workflows.
dashboard.roleGovernanceEditorScope: Editorial workflows, locale progress, and comment moderation.
dashboard.roleGovernanceEditorPolicy: Cannot assign roles; escalation via admin/owner only.
dashboard.roleGovernanceMemberScope: Personal profile and own engagement visibility.
dashboard.roleGovernanceLimited: Role management links are visible for owner/admin only.
dashboard.controlBody: Owner/admin shortcuts for operational panels. UI visibility is role-based; backend still enforces access.
dashboard.controlLimited: Admin links are visible for owner/admin roles only.
dashboard.communityBody: Effective runtime policy for UGC, comments, links, and follow controls.
dashboard.communityLoadFailed: Could not load effective community settings.
dashboard.communityEditorHint: Community settings can be edited by admin/owner roles from this card.
dashboard.activityCommunityUgcDisabled: UGC publishing is disabled in community settings.
dashboard.activityCommunityGuestDisabled: Guest comments are disabled in community settings.
dashboard.activityCommunityFollowDisabled: Follow system is disabled in community settings.
dashboard.activityCommunityCitizenCardDisabled: Citizen card visibility is disabled in community settings.
dashboard.activityCommunityBadgesDisabled: Badge visibility is disabled in community settings.
dashboard.activityNotificationSiteDisabled: In-site notifications are disabled on your profile.
dashboard.activityNotificationEmailDisabled: Email notifications are disabled on your profile.
dashboard.ownerOpsBody: Runbook-grade commands for deployment validation and infrastructure checks.
dashboard.ownerSummaryBody: Single-card snapshot for deployment and operational readiness.
dashboard.activityBody: Recent operational signals from moderation, locale, and release checks.
dashboard.activityLoadFailed: Some dashboard data failed to load.
dashboard.loadFailed: Some dashboard cards could not be loaded.
dashboard.moduleGeneralBody: Session, profile status, and personal quick actions.
dashboard.moduleModerationBody: Queue health, pending alerts, and moderation history.
dashboard.moduleTranslationBody: Locale coverage, missing keys, and deploy-required locales.
dashboard.moduleSeoBody: Canonical, robots, and sitemap verification checkpoints.
dashboard.moduleAdsBody: Consent-gated ad placement and CLS-safe slot policies.
dashboard.moduleSettingsBody: Account routing and role-based operational visibility.
